points: Designed and developed scalable web applications and high-performance RESTful APIs, translating client requirements into solutions that aligned with business objectives and user needs.
Collaborated closely with diverse clients to gather requirements, define scope, and deliver robust, production-ready applications with a focus on performance, usability, and maintainability.
Completed competitive backend challenges, demonstrating strong problem-solving and technical skills.
Gained hands-on experience with backend development, API design, and team-based problem-solving in a fast-paced remote environment.
Authoring educational articles on web development and programming for one of the world's leading technical education platforms, reaching millions of developers globally.
Translating complex technical concepts into clear, structured tutorials that support learners across different levels of expertise.
Created in-depth technical articles and step-by-step guides, simplifying complex development concepts into clear, practical content for a diverse audience.
Building a consistent personal brand through long-form technical content that drives organic readership and establishes subject matter authority.
Wrote high-quality articles and general interest content that informed and engaged a broad audience, contributing to a cumulative reach of over 1 million readers.
Authored 40+ original blog articles, leveraging SEO techniques and trend research to drive traffic, increase visibility, and deliver timely, and insightful content.
